{"parquet_files": "/home/nn/SOTA-agents/RCAgentEval/eval-data/thinkdepthai-claude-sonnet-4.6/data_3b0770bc/abnormal_traces.parquet", "query": "
SELECT service_name, span_name, 
       COUNT(*) as total_spans,
       SUM(CASE WHEN attr_status_code = 'STATUS_CODE_ERROR' OR attr_http_response_status_code >= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as error_count,
       ROUND(AVG(duration)/1000000.0, 2) as avg_duration_ms,
       ROUND(MAX(duration)/1000000.0, 2) as max_duration_ms
FROM abnormal_traces
GROUP BY service_name, span_name
ORDER BY error_count DESC
LIMIT 30
"}
